ocr_findings.description: Illustrations (OJT/Off-JT figures, mascot dog icon) represented as img-N.jpeg placeholders — expected for image-heavy pages; no substantive text is lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers OJT/Off-JT overview, e-ラーニング・アダプティブラーニング explanation, HRテック sidebar, and 試験にはコレが出る box. All body text faithfully transcribed. Image placeholders are appropriate. No character errors or missing substantive text detected.
